benefits.description: Feeling the best in terms of energy output

side_effects.description: Initially felt BAM15 was impacting cardio slightly; improved after changing dosing schedule

protocol_notes: Started end of May at 150mg/day (50mg 3x daily), escalated to 300mg/day (100mg 3x daily), then adjusted to 200mg/day (100mg 2x daily). Final schedule: 100mg between 11am-2pm depending on training time, then 100mg prior to bed. Also on TRT (recently started). Blood panels taken: April (suspected low T check), and again after TRT initiation to verify dose. No observable effects from BAM15 on bloodwork. Considers injectable L-Carnitine causes more sweating than BAM15. Using multiple peptides concurrently (not specified which). Considering dropping BAM15 for time off.
